title: Direct identifier reaches a research export
what_broke: The column research_export.patient_id carries the DirectIdentifier class, and its column-level lineage reaches research_export, a dataset whose guardian_data_product property is research_export. Lineage path: stg_ed_documentation.patient_id -> trauma_registry.patient_id -> research_export.patient_id.
why_it_matters: A de-identified research export must never carry a direct identifier: the export's deidentification_required contract forbids it. This is an export-governance violation, not a clinical judgement.
downstream_impact: Any consumer of research_export inherits the identifier, so the de-identification guarantee is broken for everything downstream of the export.

title: Explicit-missingness contract collapsed downstream
what_broke: The value column stg_ed_documentation.gcs_total carries the ExplicitMissingness class and is paired in stg_ed_documentation with the state column gcs_total_missingness. Downstream, trauma_registry keeps the value column but drops the paired state column.
why_it_matters: An explicit-missingness contract distinguishes governed reasons such as NOT_DOCUMENTED and NOT_ASSESSED from a bare SQL NULL; the contract admits those as dispositioned states while a null on an expected field is the blocking state. Dropping the paired state column erases that distinction, which is a completeness violation.
downstream_impact: Consumers reading stg_ed_documentation.gcs_total from trauma_registry can no longer tell a governed absence from a bare null.
remediation_summary: Restore the paired gcs_total_missingness column alongside stg_ed_documentation.gcs_total in trauma_registry.

title: ML feature sourced from an unvalidated dataset
what_broke: The feature ml_feature_table.raw_mode_of_arrival_feature draws directly from stg_ed_documentation, whose guardian_validation_status property is unvalidated, bypassing the validated registry that should mediate it.
why_it_matters: A feature grounded in an unvalidated source inherits its readiness gap: the governed registry exists precisely so ML consumers read validated data. This is a readiness violation.
downstream_impact: Every model trained on ml_feature_table.raw_mode_of_arrival_feature inherits the unvalidated provenance of stg_ed_documentation.
remediation_summary: Repoint ml_feature_table.raw_mode_of_arrival_feature to derive from the validated registry.
